UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2020 Off Calendar

UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Continued To Mar-24-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel, Vitaly Lipovetsky, Esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Uninsured Motorist Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-24-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Progress Report The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account For The Minor, Allen Yesin
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of The Minor, Allen Yesin
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, Allen Yesin.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Victor Lipovetsky, Esq. appeared with petitioner Svetlana Yesin, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Allen Yesin, who was also present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Yesin Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed June 30, 2019.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $65,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $16,250.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $5.500.00.
Costs - $1,445.79.

The net balance of $41,804.21 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Chase Bank, Inner Richmond Branch, located at 301 Clement Street, San Francisco, CA 94118. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to October 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for a Progress Report on the Deposit of Money into a Blocked Account.
